sourceNote: Parameter values (ranges, increments, lookup tables) extracted from the numeric setup-conversion constants in RiddleTime/Race-Element (GPLv3, github.com/RiddleTime/Race-Element), Race_Element.Data.ACC/SetupParser/Cars/GT4/MaseratiMCGT4.cs, as of 2026-07-15. These are factual encodings of ACC's own setup file format, not copied source code. Fields with confirmed:false have no declared max/range in that car's Race-Element source (only raw click-index behavior is implemented there) — validate against real setup JSON files before using in production calculations.
